evals.prompt: Calculate natal planetary positions for 1946-06-14T14:54:00Z, lat 40.700000, lon -73.816400
evals.expected_output: SUCCESS status, swissremote provider used, QC PASS, output files in artifacts/results/

evals.prompt: Calculate houses (Placidus) when primary provider times out
evals.expected_output: DEGRADED status, ephemeris backup used, QC SKIPPED

evals.prompt: Run cross-provider QC check and report any deltas over threshold
evals.expected_output: QC report with per-planet deltas, FAIL if any delta > 1.0°

evals.prompt: Call provider with invalid API key
evals.expected_output: AUTH_FAILED error, no failover triggered, user instructed to fix credentials
